nasb.text: The skillfully woven band which was on it was like its workmanship, of the same material: of gold and of blue and purple and scarlet material, and fine twisted linen, just as the Lord had commanded Moses.

esv.text: And the skillfully woven band on it was of one piece with it and made like it, of gold, blue and purple and scarlet yarns, and fine twined linen, as the Lord had commanded Moses.

cnv.text: 上面的帶子，做法好像以弗得一樣，與以弗得連在一起，都用金線、藍色紫色朱紅色線和撚的細麻做的，是照著耶和華吩咐摩西的。

ccb.text: 又按耶和华对摩西的吩咐，照以弗得的做法用金线和细麻线及蓝色、紫色、朱红色的线精工制作腰带，缝在以弗得上。
